name: Minecraft Server
postCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y tmux && curl -SsL https://playit-cloud.github.io/ppa/key.gpg | gpg --dearmor | sudo tee /etc/apt/trusted.gpg.d/playit.gpg >/dev/null && echo 'deb [signed-by=/etc/apt/trusted.gpg.d/playit.gpg] https://playit-cloud.github.io/ppa/data ./ ' | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/playit-cloud.list && sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install playit -y
